title: Fix references to members of parameterized base classes
body:
Currently on master, if there is a parameterized class in `extends` statement, the symbols in the first pass of V3LinkDot are imported from the default instance. Then some of references in the class body are linked to the members of the default instance, which is wrong.

I also found that the default instance is always marked as `isExtended` if at least one instance is extended. I don't know if it may cause some problems.

This PR skips importing symbols in the first pass of V3LinkDot, if there are parameters in the `extends` statement. It treats such case as extending a parameter, because the class can't be resolved too. And it marks as `isExtended` only the instances that are really extended.

I moved the handling of AstClassExtends to its own visitor, to separate it from AstClass.
